subcodes.title: Words to Florence Khan, spoken on 1906-06-13
subcodes.first_line: In this case, the fact that one had the desire and the intention of helping is enough for him. For 'God judges men's deeds according to the intention which actuated them.'
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @power of imagination; thought; right intention, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
